sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98059" key="suzhthth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συζητ-ητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n98059.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">joint inquirer: disputant</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg007.perseus-grc1:1:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Cor.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
